chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِرَادَةِ أَنَّهَا مِنْ صِفَاتِ الْفِعْلِ وَ سَائِرِ صِفَاتِ الْفِعْلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 14 – The Intention (Will), it is from the Attributes of the deed, and the rest of the Attributes of the deed

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن ويحتمل وجوها من التأويل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/ 2)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن ويحتمل وجوها من التأويل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/ 2)
text: خَلَقَ اللَّهُ الْمَشِيئَةَ بِنَفْسِهَا ثُمَّ خَلَقَ الْأَشْيَاءَ بِالْمَشِيئَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Axina,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Created the Desire by itself, then Created the things with the Desire’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from ‘Umar ibn ’Udhaynah from abu ‘Abdallah (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah created His Will by Will itself. Then, He created all things by His Will.”
